{"status":"ok","message-type":"work","message-version":"1.0.0","message":{"indexed":{"date-parts":[[2024,5,5]],"date-time":"2024-05-05T13:06:46Z","timestamp":1714914406688},"reference-count":0,"publisher":"Princeton University Press","isbn-type":[{"value":"9780691140315","type":"print"},{"value":"9781400838608","type":"electronic"}],"content-domain":{"domain":[],"crossmark-restriction":false},"short-container-title":[],"published-print":{"date-parts":[[2011,5,8]]},"abstract":"

This chapter examines how the \u201cyellow race\u201d became an important focus in nineteenth-century anthropology. More specifically, it considers how the whole notion of skin tone had become inextricably linked to scientifically validated prejudices and normative claims about higher and lower forms of human culture. The chapter first discusses why the term \u201cMongolian\u201d was selected to represent the people of the Far East and compares it to \u201cTartar\u201d before exploring how the new field of anthropology became preoccupied with the idea of anatomical quantification, and especially the measurement of skin color using an instrument known as the color top. It shows that the desire to find yellowness in East Asians was so ingrained in the Western imagination that some anthropologists tried to prove that their skin really was yellow.<\/p>","DOI":"10.23943\/princeton\/9780691140315.003.0004","type":"book-chapter","created":{"date-parts":[[2017,11,21]],"date-time":"2017-11-21T12:20:08Z","timestamp":1511266808000},"source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":0,"title":["Nineteenth-Century Anthropology and the Measurement of \u201cMongolian\u201d Skin Color"],"prefix":"10.23943","author":[{"given":"Michael","family":"Keevak","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"10341","published-online":{"date-parts":[[2017,10,19]]},"container-title":["Becoming Yellow"],"original-title":["Nineteenth-Century Anthropology and the Measurement of \u201cMongolian\u201d Skin Color"],"language":"en","deposited":{"date-parts":[[2022,7,28]],"date-time":"2022-07-28T13:54:14Z","timestamp":1659016454000},"score":1,"resource":{"primary":{"URL":"https:\/\/academic.oup.com\/princeton-scholarship-online\/book\/19853\/chapter\/178728118"}},"subtitle":[],"short-title":[],"issued":{"date-parts":[[2011,5,8]]},"ISBN":["9780691140315","9781400838608"],"references-count":0,"URL":"https:\/\/doi.org\/10.23943\/princeton\/9780691140315.003.0004","relation":{},"subject":[],"published":{"date-parts":[[2011,5,8]]}}}
